lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Lynx Highliner ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: Inara — Lynx Highliner
sources.what: Per-ship page: base stats, price, and passenger-cabin reference for the Lynx Highliner.

sources.label: Fandom wiki
sources.what: Lynx Highliner hull profile, passenger-cabin capacity, Mk II cabins, and role notes.

sources.label: YouTube — The Buur Pit
sources.what: Full review of the Lynx Highliner medium passenger liner, weighing whether it is worth buying.

sources.label: YouTube — Ricardos Gaming
sources.what: Review and evaluation of the Lynx Highliner, covering its role fit and per-seat value as a passenger liner.

sources.label: YouTube — TheYamiks
sources.what: Opinionated, critical review of the Lynx Highliner passenger liner.
